name: Ruby on Rails
sampleLines: D, [2024-04-28T04:02:03.234567 #12345] DEBUG -- ActiveRecord: User Load (0.3ms)  SELECT * FROM users
W, [2024-04-28T04:02:04.345678 #12345]  WARN -- : Deprecation warning: foo will be removed in Rails 7.2
E, [2024-04-28T04:02:05.456789 #12345] ERROR -- : NoMethodError (undefined method `foo' for nil)
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/rails_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). Matches Ruby's stdlib Logger 'Formatter#call' default output, which Rails uses by default for production / development logs ('SEV, [TIMESTAMP #PID] LEVEL -- PROGNAME: MESSAGE'; see Ruby Logger documentation).
